weight_transform: reshape broadcast operand (in1) to bcast-compatible shape (e.g. [1, 1, 1, W] for BcastOpDim.H as in test: B_pyt.reshape(b_weights_shape)) and convert to TILE_LAYOUT
applicability_notes: Broadcast add along H, W, or HW; result truncated back to in0 shape per golden. Commonly used for bias-add after matmul (qa_linear: matmul -> bcast ADD H) and time-embedding add in resnet blocks.
